chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1440 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.6100/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 02.11.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner, a Sanitary Worker (BPS-2) in Sukkur Municipal Corporation, has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to decide his application dated 28th August 2023 for earlier retirement. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents No.2 & 3, and undertakes that within a period of sixty days, application of the petitioner would be decided in accordance with law. Counsel for petitioner is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
